description.value: You can use your nanites and their hardlight projectors to form hardlight gear. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Creation] as a 5th-rank arcane innate spell once per day. The item you create is a hardlight projection and has no monetary value; it also doesn't need to be made of earthen or plant-derived matter. It can't replicate a specific item, such as the key card to a specific lock, unless you have intricate knowledge of what the specific item looks like and how it works, such as knowing the data that needs to be on the keycard for it to open the lock. It otherwise functions as a mundane item of its kind until your next daily preparations, though it vanishes if you move more than 100 feet away from it.
